message:
fix(io): add inline comment stripping, enforce integer range checks in text parsers

- Add strip_text_comment() helper to strip inline comments in loadtxt and
  genfromtxt, matching NumPy behavior where '#' mid-line truncates the row
- Replace wrapping integer casts with bounded parse_signed/unsigned_text_token_as<T>
  helpers that reject out-of-range values (e.g. 256 for u8) instead of
  silently wrapping, fixing conformance with NumPy's strict overflow rejection
- Add tests for inline comment stripping and integer overflow rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
